text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Say, Trainer. I haven't been feelin' too great lately.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a fever, and I'm not hurting
anywhere, but my body's been weighin' me
down...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Think I'm comin' down with something? I make
sure to eat my veggies and all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle orders herself a hamburger and a
large plate of fries while we talk.
choice_data_list: It's because of what you're eating!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What?! But I've been eatin' lots of healthy
veggies! I even snack on potato chips at night!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You can't fool me, Trainer! I know a joke when I
hear one...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wait... Are ya bein' serious? Is it really that bad?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I review her eating habits and incorporate some
healthier alternatives.
